reasoning: Koren, today we're focusing on the lactate clearance limiter that's impacting your performance during sustained efforts. Your last ride at an average of 141.5W indicates a need to challenge your system more aggressively. This session will simulate the Alpine Loop's main climb by applying over-unders to build your aerobic base and fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x 6 min Over-Unders: 3 min at 201-218W, 2 min at 242-256W, 1 min at 201-218W; 1 min rest between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
